nasb.text: Its poles shall be inserted into the rings, so that the poles shall be on the two sides of the altar when it is carried.

esv.text: And the poles shall be put through the rings, so that the poles are on the two sides of the altar when it is carried.

cnv.text: 槓要穿在祭壇的環子裡，抬祭壇的時候，槓就在祭壇的兩邊；

ccb.text: 要将两根横杠穿在祭坛两旁的铜环里，以便抬祭坛。
